title: 5W-30 Fully Synthetic Engine Oil API: SP C2/C3 5 Litre
features: For The Most Up To Date Multi-Valve Engines

Recommended by Silverhook for the following applications: API SP / C2/C3 / ILSAC GF-6 Honda HTO-06, Renault RN17, RN0700, Rn0710, GM dexos , GM LLA 025, GM LLB 025, GM 4718M & GM6094M, Chrysler MS-6395, ILSAC GF-5. VW requiring 504 / 507 backward compatible for 501.00, 502.00, 503.01, 505.00, 505.01, Ford, Nissan, KIA, Mercedes 229.52, 229.31, 51, FIAT 9.55535-S1, 9.55535-S2, Toyota, Dexos 2, BMW, Peugeot/Citroën: PSA B71 2290, EURO6.
Cleaner Running Engine, Reduces Deposits of Sludge and Carbon. Protects turbo chargers from deposit formulation
description: Silverhook 5w/30 Supreme Plus Fully-Synthetic Petrol / Diesel API SP / ILSAC GF-6 is an advanced super multi-grade engine oil providing substantial protection and outstanding performance in the most up to date Multi-Valve Engines. Starts with TM 100% Synthetic PURITY VHV1 base oils derived from the patented HT purity process which produces 99.9% pure synthetic base oil. In combination leading-edge additive technology, they deliver exceptional resistance to thermal breakdown and engine wear and deposit formulation under the most severe driving conditions. Reduced oil consumption, low evaporation loss results in less oil top up and enhanced seal compatibility to prevent leaks. Supreme Plus gives improved performance and fuel economy, Supreme Plus gives protection of exhaust emission control systems and catalytic convertors. Supreme Plus is formulated to reduce Sulphur & Phosphorus levels, which extend the life of emission control systems.
